description: High-tier probe seat of the review pipeline (#1475 packet 2): one of three distinct probe roles whose recall diversity IS the crew's breadth (replacing k draws of one scored model). Shares the FROZEN probe persona (#1256) byte-for-byte with review-probe-mid / review-probe-low and the base review-probe seat — only the bound profile (and thus model) differs. The machine-local role_profiles map in config.json binds this role to a profile (`darkmux config set role_profiles.review-probe-high <profile>`); unbound, it falls back to default_profile (the fresh-user single-model floor). Deliberately tool-less and deliberately no output_schema (free prose, not a grammar-locked flag object).
